insights.title: Wheelchair inaccessibility reported on Main St
insights.description: Multiple reports indicate construction is blocking the primary accessible ramp on 4th & Main.
insights.explainability: Detected from 5 related civic complaints filed in the last 24 hours focusing on mobility keywords.

insights.title: High stress at Central Station during commute
insights.description: Prolonged delays have increased commuter frustration significantly this morning.
insights.explainability: Aggregated transit delays combined with negative sentiment spikes on public transit channels.

impacts: 3 volunteers cleared debris from Elm Park pathway.
Local business 'Daily Grind' opened early to provide warmth during the freeze.
